title: Dog Shampoo For Itchy Skin Antibacterial And Antifungal | Natural Medicated Low Lather Safe Formula | Fast Absorbing and Skin Cooling First Aid | Great For Cuts Grazes Skin Irritation
features: Vet Recommended Cruelty Free Natural: We use only the highest quality natural cruelty free essential oil blends, expect superb coat shine, itch relief and skin healing from our product: no more uncomfortable dog walks or worries of skin damage

Puppy Safe Shampoo For Itchy Dogs: Used by professional dog groomers, our unique handmade shampoo is perfectly ph balanced and paraben free, ensuring the very best anti fungal coat and sensitive itchy skin protection

Vitamin E Rich Non Toxic Non Irritant Formula: No more worries about harmful treatments, our products are always cruelty free and natural resulting in fast healing and repairing of dog coat and skin: vitamin e is great for moisturising and restoring cracked or damaged areas of your dog or puppy's coat and skin

Low Lathering Easy Application Product: Works easily into dogs coat and gets to work quickly soothing and relieving itchy skin and protecting against any further coat or skin damage: great antibacterial and anti-fungal protection

C&G Ethical Family Commitment: Proudly handcrafted in the UK, our products adhere to socially responsible practices, utilizing locally sourced and sustainable ingredients. With an emphasis on cruelty-free production and eco-friendly recyclable packaging, we stand firmly behind the quality of our antifungal shampoo. If you're not completely satisfied, let us know and we will offer you a full refund, no questions asked. As a small, family-owned business of pet enthusiasts, we are dedicated to creating exceptional products that are safe for you, your pets, and our planet!
description: Product Description Our anti-itch dog shampoo contains natural essential oils to calm dry, itchy skin instantly. Cooling peppermint, spearmint and tea tree soothe and relax tired and strained muscles. Anti-bacterial and anti-fungal properties help to clean minor wounds and grazes and aid itchy skin conditions instantly. This anti-bacterial anti-itch shampoo is the perfect addition to your dog’s first aid kit. It can be used as part of your dog’s grooming routine to nourish skin and keep their coat feeling soft. If used regularly, the natural formula encourages new hair growth for a thicker, healthier coat. Comes in 1 litre. Directions Apply to coat and rinse without lathering or diluting
